gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands tall, smiles broadly, and opens both arms wide while enthusiastically announcing the topic of addition
a person raises one hand, extends fingers forward, and gently waves it side to side, inviting the class to show five fingers
a tutor walks closer to the number line, points to the starting point, and gestures invitingly toward the numbers while explaining
a person steps back slightly, moves one finger upward with each count, and visually highlights the increments on the number line
a tutor bends down slightly, extends both hands invitingly toward the learners, and encourages them to gather small objects for counting
a person stands confidently, gestures with both hands toward the objects, and encourages everyone to count them out loud together
a tutor claps hands together, beams with joy, and leans slightly forward to celebrate the successful addition of five plus five
a person raises one hand, spreads fingers wide, and gestures back and forth as if demonstrating the use of numbers and objects
